title.en: This miraculous Zuwen artifact dissipated and c...

content.en:
Soon after, all the ancestral texts on the black bell shattered, and even the black bell began to disintegrate and dissipate.

This miraculous Zuwen artifact dissipated and ceased to exist again.

If such an ancestral holy relic falls on the territory of the Ten Great Holy Gates, I am afraid that it would have been protected long ago and its quota strictly controlled, even if the domain ancestors within the Battle Gate wanted to obtain the opportunity to participate in enlightenment, it would be extremely difficult.

In this way, it is possible to ensure that the Zuwen relics will be used for a long time.

But now, the human race has no way to monopolize the ancestral relics, so they can only choose to use them this way.

Of course, the Terrans don't have much to lose.

After all, this ancestral artifact has greatly increased the strength of the human race, and many ancestors of the human race have cultivated one or more domain techniques to the consummation realm or even the extreme realm, and their cultivation of various secret techniques has reached an extremely high level.

After this time, the Terran domain ancestors will rise one after another.

However, the biggest harvest is undoubtedly Ye Tian.

He has cultivated the Void Slash Holy Technique to the extreme realm, which is a huge breakthrough, which is equivalent to stepping into another level!

The key is that the cultivation of the Void Slash Saint Technique has reached the limit level, which in turn has given Ye Tian a slight understanding of the Void Ancestor Method, which is a great progress.

The birth of the Soul Saint Realm and the Ancestral Sacred Relic has made many domain ancestors pay attention to the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Anyone can see that the Xuanxu Holy Realm is not simple.

If it weren't for Ye Tian having the Battle Gate as a backer behind him, presumably the other Holy Gates wouldn't mind occupying a Xuanxu Holy Realm.

But because of the battle gate, even if the other holy gates can see that the Xuanxu Holy Realm is not simple, they will not capture the Xuanxu Holy Realm, at most they will send some more domain ancestors to mix in the opportunity of the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

In the following days, not only the Xuanxu Saint Realm, but also many good things were born everywhere in the Daoshan Realm.

And a lot of good things have fallen into the hands of the human race, because the Dao Mountain Realm now has the largest number of human races, and the ordinary treasures, those top domain ancestors and the strongest domain ancestors, will not come to snatch them from the human race.

And at the level below the domain ancestor, the human race crushed everything.

As time passed, the Terrans grew stronger.

Although Ye Tian has always been at the top Domain Ancestor level, he is also making steady progress, constantly refining his soul and domain power and domain body, although it will be a long time before he hits the strongest Domain Ancestor level.

After all, he wouldn't casually impact the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm, otherwise, he would have been able to step into the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm at any time.

-------------------

The Dark Sanctuary, the Holy Maiden's Gate.

The light-clothed saintess also learned about the news about the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and was immediately very curious.

"The Xuanxu Holy Realm is not simple, the Soul Saint Realm has just been born, and the Soul Saint Realm Flower was born not long ago, and the Holy Relic was born, as well as the Ancestral Sacred Relic, the ordinary Holy Realm can't do this. Moreover, the resources of the Xuanxu Saint Realm are very rich, even more abundant than the ordinary Saint Realm that has just been born. Although there are more opportunities for dark holy relics, many good opportunities are basically controlled by the Invincible Domain Ancestors and Supreme Domain Ancestors, and we Holy Sons can't intervene at all, but the opportunities of the Xuanxu Holy Realm can be fought for, in case a very precious opportunity is born there, it will also be of great help to me to impact the Supreme Domain Ancestor in the future!"

The light-clothed saint thought.

There is another point, she wants to know what level Ye Tian's strength has reached now.

When returning to the One Realm, she admitted that she was not Ye Tian's opponent.

But now, under the full cultivation of the Holy Maiden Sect and her parents, although she is now only at the top Domain Ancestor level, her combat power is extremely strong, and she has even cultivated a holy technique to the limit with the help of a rare treasure.

Moreover, she also cultivated her holy body to the limit.

It has to be said that as a saint-endowed person, she has resources that others can't imagine.

Although Ye Tian is a Saint Endowment, the resource cultivation he has actually obtained is far from being comparable to that of the Saint Endowment, after all, he has a Peerless Domain Grandparents, but he does not.

this day.

The light-clothed saint took a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors to the Daoshan Realm Xuanxu Saint Realm.

In addition to the light-clothed saintess, many genius domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain also went to the Daoshan Realm, and among them, there were many demonic beings among the strongest domain ancestors.

Once these Domain Ancestors reached the Dao Mountain Realm, the competition in the Xuanxu Saint Realm would rise to a notch.

--------------------

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, a big man has come to the battle gate!"

The True Spirit Domain Ancestor came to inform Ye Tian.

"Big shots?"

Ye Tian didn't know who the big man the True Spirit Domain Ancestor was talking about.

The True Spirit Domain Ancestor didn't let Ye Tian guess, and said directly: "The big man who came from the Battle Gate is also a Supreme Domain Ancestor, but his status is very unusual, he is the top thirty demons on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List, and he has even killed the Invincible Domain Ancestor!"

"Top !!!"

Ye Tian had heard of this list, there was a supreme list within every holy gate, and it recorded the list of the top supreme domain ancestors, even the first-grade supreme domain ancestors were not qualified to enter this list.

From ancient times to the present, how many Supreme Domain Ancestors have been born in a Holy Gate, and even if some Supreme Domain Ancestors are qualified to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor, they are not in a hurry to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor, but stay at the Supreme Domain Ancestor level.

For countless domain ancestors, the invincible domain ancestor was their ultimate, so they stayed in the supreme domain ancestor for countless years to strengthen their foundation, just to become more powerful after becoming the invincible domain ancestor.

In this way, even if there is no hope of becoming a Supreme Domain Ancestor in the future, he is qualified to dominate among the Invincible Domain Ancestors.

For example, the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor is very powerful at the level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and he can easily kill the average Invincible Domain Ancestor.

There are many ancient Supreme Strength Domain Ancestors in any Holy Gate, so it is so difficult to be able to be ranked in the top 30 of the Supreme Power List among the large number of Ancient Supreme Strength Domain Ancestors!

For example, among the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, there is also the existence of the Holy Endowment!

Only 100 people are included in the Supreme Domain Ancestor, so any Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Strength List has a very high status, not weaker than the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

For the True Spirit Domain Ancestor, the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme List could easily wipe him out, and he was definitely a big man among the big guys.

From the mouth of the True Spirit Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian also knew the name of that Domain Ancestor-

Herring Domain Ancestor!
